'''jashodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanase|cyanase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanase|cyanase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jashodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshedheth|jæshedheth]] || [[word:jæshedhej|jæshedhej]] || [[word:jæshedhesh|jæshedhesh]] || [[word:jæshedhe|jæshedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashoshodhoth|jashoshodhoth]] || [[word:jashoshodhoj|jashoshodhoj]] || [[word:jashoshodhosh|jashoshodhosh]] || [[word:jashoshodho|jashoshodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashodhoth|jashodhoth]] || [[word:jashodhoj|jashodhoj]] || [[word:jashodhosh|jashodhosh]] || [[word:jashodho|jashodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashofdhoth|jashofdhoth]] || [[word:jashofdhoj|jashofdhoj]] || [[word:jashofdhosh|jashofdhosh]] || [[word:jashofdhof|jashofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashodhotho|jashodhotho]] || [[word:jashodhojo|jashodhojo]] || [[word:jashodhosho|jashodhosho]] || [[word:jashodhoko|jashodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashodhoth|jashodhoth]] || [[word:jashodhoj|jashodhoj]] || [[word:jashodhosh|jashodhosh]] || [[word:jashodho|jashodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashodhothol|jashodhothol]] || [[word:jashodhojol|jashodhojol]] || [[word:jashodhoshol|jashodhoshol]] || [[word:jashodhokol|jashodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashodhothotho|jashodhothotho]] || [[word:jashodhojojo|jashodhojojo]] || [[word:jashodhoshosho|jashodhoshosho]] || [[word:jashodhoko|jashodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashodhothon|jashodhothon]] || [[word:jashodhojon|jashodhojon]] || [[word:jashodhoshon|jashodhoshon]] || [[word:jashodhokon|jashodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashodhothoro|jashodhothoro]] || [[word:jashodhojoro|jashodhojoro]] || [[word:jashodhoshoro|jashodhoshoro]] || [[word:jashodhokoro|jashodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
